case_title: RICHARD SOROORI VS. PRETZ MUCHEN et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-21-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SOROORI, RICHARD

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-16-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-06-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-21-2012 AT 2:00PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOROORI, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT MUCHEN, PRETZ ALDEMA INVESTMENT CORPORATION OF FLORIDA DELLER, ALBERTO TALMADGE, WILIAM SINEL, ARON DEWOLF REALTY DOES 1 TO 20 INCL. SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST RICHARD SOROORI, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-06-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-22-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
